name: MERCER INTERNATIONAL INC.
summary: Mercer International Inc. (MERC) is a global forest products company operating in the pulp and solid wood industries. The company produces northern bleached softwood kraft (NBSK) pulp, lumber, and related wood products. It also generates and sells green energy and chemicals as byproducts of its pulp manufacturing operations. Mercer operates mills primarily in Germany and Canada, serving markets across Europe, North America, and Asia.
